For acne, try salicylic acid cleanser + niacinamide + SPF daily 🎯
Breakouts? Keep your hands off your face and use a gentle BHA 🌿
Niacinamide is your best friend for {condition} — reduces redness fast! 💜
For dry skin: hyaluronic acid + ceramides + a rich moisturizer 💧
Try layering a hydrating toner before your moisturizer {name}! 🫧
Avoid hot showers and harsh cleansers — they strip your skin barrier 🚿
For oily skin: niacinamide + zinc + lightweight gel moisturizer 🧴

Don't skip moisturizer — dehydrated skin actually produces MORE oil! 💡
Vitamin C in the morning + SPF is the ultimate dark spot duo ☀️
Alpha arbutin and niacinamide together work great for {condition} marks 🌟
Consistency is key for dark spots {name} — give it 8-12 weeks 🗓️
Niacinamide is amazing for {condition}! Reduces inflammation, controls oil, and fades marks 🌿
Use niacinamide twice daily — it works for almost every skin type including {condition} 💜
Niacinamide + zinc is a power combo especially great for {condition} ✨
Start retinol slow — 2x a week at night only. Great for {condition} long term 💡
Always use SPF the next morning when using retinol {name}! ☀️
Retinol can cause purging at first — totally normal, stick with it 💪
SPF every single morning is non-negotiable especially with {condition} ☀️
SPF 30 minimum {name}! Reapply every 2 hours if you're outside 🌤️
Sunscreen is the best anti-aging AND anti-dark spot product you can use 🏆
Basic AM routine for {condition}: Cleanser → Niacinamide → Moisturizer → SPF 🌅
Basic PM routine for {condition}: Cleanser → Treatment → Moisturizer 🌙
Keep it simple {name}! 3-4 steps done consistently beats 10 steps done randomly 💯

Hyaluronic acid pulls moisture into your skin — apply it on damp skin for best results {name}! 💧
Great for {condition}! Layer hyaluronic acid before your moisturizer 🫧
If your {condition} feels tight or dehydrated, hyaluronic acid is your go-to 💙
Ceramides repair your skin barrier — essential if {condition} has damaged it 🛡️
CeraVe products are packed with ceramides and perfect for {condition} {name}! 💜
A damaged barrier makes {condition} worse — ceramides rebuild it overnight 🌙
Salicylic acid is a BHA that gets deep into pores — perfect for {condition} 🎯
Use salicylic acid cleanser or toner 2-3x a week for {condition} {name} 🌿
Salicylic acid unclogs pores and reduces blackheads — great for oily and acne skin 💚
Benzoyl peroxide kills acne-causing bacteria directly — strong but effective for {condition} 💪
Start with 2.5% benzoyl peroxide {name} — lower strength means less irritation 🌿
Don't use benzoyl peroxide with retinol on the same night — they cancel each other out! ⚠️
Go to the Analyzer tab to scan your face! It detects 5 conditions: acne, dry skin, oily skin, dark spots, and normal skin 📸
Head to the Analyzer tab {name} — upload a selfie or take one and I'll detect your skin condition! 🔍
The skin scanner uses AI to detect your condition with a confidence score — try it in the Analyzer tab! 🤖
Your scan shows {condition}! Confidence above 85% means Severe, 65-85% is Moderate, below 65% is Mild 📊
Mild means early stage, Moderate means it needs attention, Severe means please consult a dermatologist too 💙
Your {condition} result means I'll recommend specific ingredients to help — check the recommendations below your scan! 🌿
Head to the Planner tab to log your AM and PM routine for today {name}! 📅
The Planner has a calendar view — tap any day to log your routine and skin feeling 🗓️
Logging daily helps track your {condition} progress over time — consistency is everything! 💪
Your dashboard in the Planner tab shows your skin condition trend over time {name}! 📈
The progress charts show routine consistency, skin feeling trend, and scan history all in one place 📊
You need at least 2 scans to see your trend — keep scanning to track your {condition} journey! 🌟
Go to the Analyzer tab and use the Product Scanner section — paste your ingredient list and I'll score it for {condition}! 🧴
The product scorer rates 0-100 based on how compatible ingredients are with your {condition} 📊
You can even compare two products side by side to see which one suits {condition} better {name}! ⚖️
Go to the Planner tab and use the Routine Builder {name}! Answer a few questions and I'll generate your AM and PM routine for {condition} 🌅🌙
The Routine Builder considers your skin condition, time available, and budget — head to the Planner tab! ⚙️
For {condition} I'd suggest: AM — Cleanser, Niacinamide, SPF. PM — Cleanser, Treatment, Moisturizer 🌿
Head to the Settings tab to update your name, skin type, and notification preferences {name}! ⚙️
You can export your scan history as CSV or clear all data from the Settings tab 📁
Settings tab also has dark mode toggle and full privacy info — all your data stays local! 🔒
Your data is 100% local {name} — stored only on your device, never sent to any server 🔒
No personal information is collected. Images are processed in memory and not saved by default 🛡️
This app uses local SQLite storage only — your skin data stays private and secure 💙
